title: Baked Fish with Herbs
description: A simple and flavorful fish dish with a Mediterranean twist, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Fish (4 fillets)
ingredients.notes: Any white fish works well, such as cod or tilapia

instructions: Season fish with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic and chopped basil.
Place fish on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush fish with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic-basil mixture.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until fish is cooked through.
